description: Composition Full sleeves shirt with black and white plaid checks, made of 100% cotton, has a patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered brand logo, full length buttoned placket, godet inserts on the sides, curved hemline, and an attached grey vest that has graphic print on the front with brand name Fitting Slim Wash care Machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron When it's Thursday and you want to wear something that's not formal, but not casual either, try this semi-formal checked shirt from scullers. For a spunky look wear the shirt unbuttoned, showing off the attached grey vest. Wear it buttoned up for a chic, cool look. Pair it with denims or corduroys and walk in style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
